Operation 'unsubscribeFromAddressBook' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description is too brief and lacks critical details for AI agent interpretation. The improved description clarifies: (1) what the operation does (removes user from subscription), (2) authentication requirement, (3) input parameter details (CRM name), (4) side effects (user stops receiving communications, state change), (5) return value type, and (6) irreversibility context. This helps AI agents understand when and how to use this operation appropriately.

data.current_description: Unsubscribe from a CRM address book.
data.description_suggestion: Removes the authenticated user from a specified CRM address book subscription. Requires the CRM name as a path parameter. Upon successful unsubscription, the user will no longer receive communications from that address book. Returns a subscription response confirming the unsubscription status. This operation modifies the user's subscription state and cannot be reversed without re-subscribing.
data.reasoning: The current description is too brief and lacks critical details for AI agent interpretation. The improved description clarifies: (1) what the operation does (removes user from subscription), (2) authentication requirement, (3) input parameter details (CRM name), (4) side effects (user stops receiving communications, state change), (5) return value type, and (6) irreversibility context. This helps AI agents understand when and how to use this operation appropriately.

message: Operation 'authorizeUser' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks details about required parameters, the authorization code returned, and how it connects to the token exchange flow. Added parameter requirements, return value details, and the relationship to the token endpoint for better AI agent understanding of the OAuth 2.0 flow.

data.current_description: Redirects the user to the Vuepak authorization page to grant access.
data.description_suggestion: Initiates the OAuth 2.0 authorization flow by redirecting the user to the Vuepak authorization page. Requires client_id, redirect_uri, response_type, and scope parameters. User grants permission to access their Vuepak account. Returns a redirect to the specified redirect_uri with an authorization code that can be exchanged for an access token via the /api/v1/token endpoint.
data.reasoning: Description lacks details about required parameters, the authorization code returned, and how it connects to the token exchange flow. Added parameter requirements, return value details, and the relationship to the token endpoint for better AI agent understanding of the OAuth 2.0 flow.

message: Operation 'getAccessToken' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description is too brief. Added specific input requirements (authorization code, client credentials, grant_type), response schema details (TokenResponse fields), and clarification that the returned token is used for API authentication. This helps AI agents understand the complete token exchange process.

data.current_description: Exchange an authorization code for an access token.
data.description_suggestion: Exchanges an authorization code for an access token in the OAuth 2.0 authorization code flow. Requires authorization code, client_id, client_secret, and grant_type parameters in the request body. Returns a TokenResponse containing the access_token, token_type, expires_in, and refresh_token. The access token is used to authenticate subsequent API requests.
data.reasoning: Original description is too brief. Added specific input requirements (authorization code, client credentials, grant_type), response schema details (TokenResponse fields), and clarification that the returned token is used for API authentication. This helps AI agents understand the complete token exchange process.

message: Operation 'listContacts' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description mentions optional filtering but doesn't specify the parameter name or what happens when no filter is provided. Added parameter name (addressbook_id), clarification about default behavior when unfiltered, and return value details (Contact objects) for improved AI agent usability.

data.current_description: Retrieve contacts, optionally filtered by address book.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all contacts for the authenticated user, optionally filtered by a specific address book using the addressbook_id parameter. Returns a list of Contact objects containing contact details. If no address book filter is specified, returns contacts from all address books.
data.reasoning: Description mentions optional filtering but doesn't specify the parameter name or what happens when no filter is provided. Added parameter name (addressbook_id), clarification about default behavior when unfiltered, and return value details (Contact objects) for improved AI agent usability.

message: Operation 'listCompanyContacts' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Original description is vague about what 'company-level' means and doesn't clarify the distinction from regular contacts. Added context about company contacts representing organizational records, return value details, and explicit differentiation from individual contacts to help AI agents understand when to use this endpoint versus listContacts.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves company-level contacts for the authenticated user. Company contacts represent organizational or business-level contact records within address books. Returns a list of Contact objects with company-level contact information. This endpoint differs from listContacts which retrieves individual contacts.
data.reasoning: Original description is vague about what 'company-level' means and doesn't clarify the distinction from regular contacts. Added context about company contacts representing organizational records, return value details, and explicit differentiation from individual contacts to help AI agents understand when to use this endpoint versus listContacts.

message: Operation 'subscribeToAddressBook' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks specifics about the crm parameter format, what CRM providers are supported, return value details, and the side effect of initiating sync. Added parameter clarification with examples, return schema details (SubscriptionResponse), and explicit mention of the sync side effect for better AI agent understanding of the operation's impact.

data.current_description: Subscribe to a CRM address book for syncing.
data.description_suggestion: Subscribes the authenticated user to a CRM address book for automatic syncing. Requires the CRM provider name (e.g., Salesforce, HubSpot) as the crm path parameter. Establishes a connection between the user's Vuepak account and the specified CRM system. Returns a SubscriptionResponse confirming the subscription status. Side effect: Initiates automatic synchronization of contacts from the CRM address book to Vuepak.
data.reasoning: Description lacks specifics about the crm parameter format, what CRM providers are supported, return value details, and the side effect of initiating sync. Added parameter clarification with examples, return schema details (SubscriptionResponse), and explicit mention of the sync side effect for better AI agent understanding of the operation's impact.
